builder_point_distribution_7.description: point-resolved distribution or incidence of each builder label over the seven Fano points, not just P1/L3/F7 zone aggregates

jabber_point_distribution_7.description: point-resolved distribution or incidence of each jabber label over the seven Fano points

builder_signed_edge_action.description: permutation or signed monomial action of signed-Fano/D6 generators on builder labels

jabber_signed_edge_action.description: permutation or signed monomial action of signed-Fano/D6 generators on jabber labels

six_channel_signed_coordinates.description: coordinates resolving B-,B+,V-,V+,S-,S+ including sign/orientation if signed-D6 is to be tested

quotient_maps_to_A42_A12.description: map connecting strategy labels to A42/A12 classes if global tower descent is to be certified

why_current_data_fails: v8 supplies only zone aggregates P1, L3_minus_P1, F7_minus_L3. This recovers the 8-element incident flag stabilizer exactly but cannot recover the 24-element point stabilizer S4 or signed-D6 actions on the 16 labels.
